recommendations.rationale: Avoid new swing exposure while Tencent sits at a 60-day low in a confirmed downtrend with weak volume support.
evidence: Latest close 493.4 HKD is below both MA20 522.695 and MA60 563.4067.
Range position 60 is 0.0 and regime flag is downtrend.
1-day move was -0.444% with volume ratio 0.6597, showing no strong reversal confirmation.
risks: A sharp policy or earnings catalyst could reverse the downtrend quickly.
Low-volume decline may reflect seller exhaustion rather than fresh distribution.
recommendations.invalidation: Reconsider if price reclaims the MA20 with above-average volume and no longer prints near the 60-day low.

recommendations.rationale: Avoid new exposure because Alibaba remains below key moving averages and near the bottom of its 60-day range.
evidence: Latest close 122.6 HKD is below MA20 129.85 and MA60 148.0117.
Range position 60 is 0.0539 and regime flag is downtrend.
1-day move was -0.325% with weak volume ratio 0.5171.
risks: Internet-platform sentiment could rebound as a group and lift Alibaba from oversold levels.
Weak volume can make near-term price action noisy and prone to short-covering rallies.
recommendations.invalidation: Reconsider if price closes back above MA20 with volume ratio above 1.0 and range position improves materially.

recommendations.rationale: Xiaomi led the stock watchlist for the day, but the broader setup is still a downtrend and below moving averages, so wait for confirmation.
evidence: 1-day move was +1.726%, the strongest move among watched stocks.
Latest close 33.0 HKD remains below MA20 33.376 and MA60 35.5177.
Regime flag is downtrend and range position 60 is only 0.1632.
risks: The bounce may fail because price remains below both moving averages.
Volume ratio 0.6782 does not confirm strong institutional demand.
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only if Xiaomi reclaims MA20 and sustains higher lows with stronger volume; downgrade if it breaks below the latest low of 31.92.

recommendations.rationale: Broad Hong Kong market exposure is not compelling yet because the ETF remains in a downtrend despite a small positive day.
evidence: Latest close 25.2 HKD is below MA20 25.74 and MA60 26.5423.
1-day move was +0.239%, but regime flag remains downtrend.
Range position 60 is 0.1437, still near the lower part of the 60-day range.
risks: A broad market policy-driven rally could start before moving averages confirm.
ETF diversification may reduce single-name downside but still follows weak market regime.
recommendations.invalidation: Consider buy_candidate only after a close above MA20 with improving breadth across the watchlist.

recommendations.rationale: Hang Seng Tech ETF has the best ETF confirmation from volume, but price is still below trend levels and near the range floor.
evidence: 1-day move was +0.515%, the strongest ETF move in the snapshot.
Volume ratio 20 was 1.0232, the only watched item above average volume.
Latest close 4.68 HKD is below MA20 4.8262 and MA60 5.2527 with regime flag downtrend.
risks: Above-average volume may be churn rather than accumulation if price cannot reclaim MA20.
Concentration in technology names keeps downside tied to weak internet-platform leaders.
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade if price closes above MA20 on continued above-average volume; downgrade if it loses the latest low of 4.618.

recommendations.rationale: iShares Hang Seng TECH ETF is stabilizing but lacks enough volume or trend confirmation for a buy call.
evidence: 1-day move was +0.4%, but latest close 10.04 HKD remains below MA20 10.35 and MA60 11.2562.
Range position 60 is 0.0607, near the bottom of the 60-day range.
Volume ratio 20 is 0.7126, below average, while regime flag remains downtrend.
risks: Low volume could make the apparent stabilization unreliable.
Hang Seng Tech weakness may persist while major constituents remain in downtrends.
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only if price reclaims MA20 with volume confirmation; downgrade if price breaks below the latest low of 9.905.
